title: Water Supply and Sanitation (Arusha Urban Water Supply and Sanitation Authority) Extension of Service Area) Notice, 2023
title_en: Water Supply and Sanitation (Arusha Urban Water Supply and Sanitation Authority) Extension of Service Area) Notice, 2023

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Water Supply and Sanitation (Arusha Urban Water Supply and Sanitation Authority) Extension of Service Area) Notice, 2023.

provisions.title: Extension of Service area
provisions.content: The Service area of Arusha Urban Water Supply and Sanitation Authority is hereby extended to include the areas specified in Schedule to this Notice.

provisions.title: Disestablishment and transition
provisions.content: (1) Any Community Organisation or entity registered prior to coming in to operation of this Notice providing water supply and sanitation services in the extended services areas shall cease to provide such services. (2) The rights, responsibilities, tenure of employees, assets and liabilities or any other related matters given, issued or undertaken by the disestablished water authorities shall be vested to Arusha urban Water Supply and Sanitation Authority. Schedule (made under paragraph 2) Name of Water Supply and Sanitation Authority Extended area of service District/ Township Ward Village/Street Arusha Urban Water Supply and Sanitation Authority Longido District Namanga The whole ward Kimokowo Loloibonyi, Endepesi, Eworendeke na Etilali Simanjiro District/ Mererani Township Mererani Tunduru, Msikitini, Mirerani, Kangaroo, Songambele, Songambele A, Getini, Manyara, Kilimanjiro, Twiga, Tanzanite na Kwa Nyiti. Endiamtu Mji Mpya, Zaire, Tupendani, Kisimani, Cairo, Kazamoyo, Kazamoyo juu, Tenki la Maji, Endiamtu, Sekondari, Kilimahewa na Tanesco Shambarai Shambarai, Kandasikira Naisinyai Naisinyai History of this document 17 March 2023 this version Published in Gazette of the United Republic of Tanzania 10 Commenced 08 March 2023 Assented to Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all.
